styles.name: 미니멀 클린 / Minimal Clean
styles.description: Clean, spacious layouts with generous whitespace that lets each element breathe. Typography is the hero—thin weights, precise spacing, and subtle geometric accents do the heavy lifting. The result feels calm, considered, and quietly professional.

styles.name: 코퍼레이트 모던 / Corporate Modern
styles.description: Structured grid layouts anchor bold accent colors that signal authority without shouting. Professional header bands frame the content, and clean data visualization areas make numbers feel trustworthy. Balanced composition projects confidence and reliability.

styles.name: 그라디언트 플로우 / Gradient Flow
styles.description: Smooth multi-stop color transitions ripple across the background like liquid light, punctuated by flowing organic shapes. Frosted glass card overlays sit above the vibrant gradients, creating depth and dimensionality. The overall feel is energetic, modern, and unmistakably contemporary.

styles.name: 다크 엘레건트 / Dark Elegant
styles.description: Deep dark backgrounds act as a stage for luminous accent colors that seem to glow from within. High-contrast typography commands attention, while subtle glow halos and fine metallic lines add tactile richness. Every slide feels like a premium product reveal.

styles.name: 네이처 오가닉 / Nature Organic
styles.description: Earth-toned palettes of sage, terracotta, and warm cream evoke sun-drenched landscapes and natural materials. Soft rounded shapes and botanical-inspired line decorations weave through the layout like vines. Warm and approachable, it invites the audience to lean in.

styles.name: 테크 네온 / Tech Neon
styles.description: A near-black base serves as the canvas for electric neon accent lines and glowing highlight nodes. Circuit-board–inspired geometric patterns trace paths across backgrounds, giving a sense of live data flowing through the slide. The aesthetic is futuristic, precise, and unmistakably innovative.

styles.name: 파스텔 소프트 / Pastel Soft
styles.description: Carefully balanced pastel combinations—lavender, peach, mint, and sky—fill the space with gentle energy. Rounded corners on every card and button soften the edges, while delicate drop shadows lift elements off the page. Playful without being childish, it feels friendly and inviting.

styles.name: 볼드 지오메트릭 / Bold Geometric
styles.description: Large, assertive geometric shapes—triangles, trapezoids, overlapping circles—march across the slide with Bauhaus conviction. Vivid primary colors clash and harmonize in equal measure, while dynamic diagonal angles inject kinetic energy. Presentations built this way are impossible to ignore.

styles.name: 클래식 아카데믹 / Classic Academic
styles.description: Traditional serif typefaces set the scholarly tone, backed by structured column layouts that recall printed journals and bound monographs. A muted palette of ivory, charcoal, and deep burgundy conveys gravitas, while restrained gold accents nod to institutional prestige. Authoritative and timelessly elegant.

styles.name: 스칸디나비안 휘게 / Scandinavian Hygge
styles.description: Warm oat, birch, and flax tones create a cozy envelope that feels like a well-lit cabin in winter. Minimalist layouts keep things uncluttered while natural wood-grain textures and soft hand-drawn accents add tactile warmth. The result is comfortable, refined, and deeply human.

styles.name: 메디컬 클리니컬 / Medical Clinical
styles.description: Pristine white cards float on a cool ice-blue background, evoking clinical sterility and trustworthiness. Clean grid layouts with rounded-corner data boxes and subtle icon placeholders convey medical precision. The palette centers on calming blues and teals that reassure patients and professionals alike.

styles.name: 파마 바이오텍 / Pharma Biotech
styles.description: Deep forest greens and crisp whites create a laboratory-grade aesthetic that speaks to scientific rigor. Structured data rows and molecular-style dot decorations reinforce the biotech narrative. A green header stripe anchors each slide with institutional authority.

styles.name: 에듀 클래스룸 / Edu Classroom
styles.description: Bright, energetic orange and warm yellow tones spark curiosity and engagement. Bold header sections with numbered list cards make complex topics approachable for younger audiences. Fun accent shapes and generous spacing keep attention focused without overwhelming.

styles.name: 에듀 리서치 / Edu Research
styles.description: Scholarly navy blues and soft sky accents create an atmosphere of intellectual depth. A left sidebar for section labels paired with a main content area mirrors academic paper layouts. Footnote-style bottom bars and structured typography honor research conventions.

styles.name: 스타트업 피치 / Startup Pitch
styles.description: Electric purple and hot pink collide with cyan accents to create slides that demand attention in any pitch room. Full-bleed accent blocks, oversized metric numbers, and diagonal slash dividers project confidence and disruption. Every slide is designed to make investors lean forward.

styles.name: SaaS 프로덕트 / SaaS Product
styles.description: Deep indigo foundations support clean card-based layouts that mirror dashboard interfaces. Subtle shadows and metric boxes with icon placeholders communicate technical sophistication without complexity. The palette balances authority with the approachability that B2B buyers expect.

styles.name: 마케팅 캠페인 / Marketing Campaign
styles.description: Vivid magenta, fiery orange, and golden yellow create an attention-grabbing trifecta that pops off every slide. Bold 50/50 color splits and large display typography deliver messages with unmissable impact. Vibrant accent overlays ensure no point goes unnoticed.

styles.name: 브랜드 스토리텔링 / Brand Storytelling
styles.description: Dark navy foundations with cool gray tones and a single red accent create editorial magazine-quality slides. Asymmetric layouts, pull-quote styling, and dramatic whitespace give every message room to resonate. Serif headings add gravitas to the narrative arc.

styles.name: 파이낸스 트러스트 / Finance Trust
styles.description: Institutional navy and deep blue tones project the stability and reliability that financial audiences demand. Strict grid alignment, conservative spacing, and muted borders create slides that feel as solid as a balance sheet. Every element whispers credibility.

styles.name: 컨설팅 스트래터지 / Consulting Strategy
styles.description: Crisp white backgrounds with thin black borders and bold golden-yellow accents channel the clarity of top-tier consulting decks. Structured hierarchy, clean data presentation, and deliberate negative space let strategic insights speak for themselves.

styles.name: 거버먼트 액세서블 / Gov Accessible
styles.description: High-contrast navy and white with strong blue accents prioritize readability above all else. Large text sizes, generous spacing, and clear visual hierarchy ensure accessibility compliance. Every design choice serves the goal of universal comprehension.

styles.name: NGO 임팩트 / NGO Impact
styles.description: Earthy olive greens and warm amber tones convey genuine commitment to positive change. Storytelling layouts with hand-drawn-style underlines and warm header bands invite emotional connection. The palette feels grounded, honest, and deeply human.

styles.name: 크리에이티브 포트폴리오 / Creative Portfolio
styles.description: Stark black and white foundations provide the canvas for bold red and gold accent explosions. Asymmetric overlapping elements and thick borders create an avant-garde gallery feel. Every slide is a statement piece that showcases creative confidence.

styles.name: 리테일 라이프스타일 / Retail Lifestyle
styles.description: Warm terracotta, sandy beige, and sage green create a lifestyle magazine aesthetic that feels aspirational yet approachable. Soft pastel cards with rounded elements and lifestyle imagery placeholders tell a visual story of curated living.

styles.name: AI 퓨처리스틱 / AI Futuristic
styles.description: Deep cosmic navy backgrounds dotted with neural-network-style connecting nodes create a sense of infinite digital intelligence. Purple and mint accent glows float above the void like data constellations. Floating card elements and subtle particle effects evoke the frontier of artificial intelligence.
